decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id 'project_hylan-blvd-transportation-improvement-study' already matches the closest registry record — same project name ('Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study'), same borough (Staten Island), and same source ('201109_brt_hylan_proposed') is already listed in the registry record's source_ids. The observation already resolves to that canonical id; no link to a different record is needed.
